headline: AI Music Composition: Generative Music, Style Imitation, and Creative AI Audio
description: AI composes music -- from text descriptions ("upbeat pop song about summer love") to complete radio-quality tracks with vocals and instrumentation. Suno AI, Udio, and AIVA challenge the definition of musical creativity, while professional tools like Magenta and Splice augment human composers.

citation.name: Generative AI for Music Composition: Text-to-Music, Style Transfer, and Creative Audio Synthesis (2024-2025 Survey)
Deep Learning for Music Generation: Autoregressive, Diffusion, and GAN Approaches from Jukebox to Suno
